title: Extraction Method F
author: Faezah Mohd Salleh
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.infcdbn

steps.title: Cut tissue (25-50 mg) into small pieces
steps.instruction: Cut tissue (25-50 mg) into small pieces.

steps.title: Add 500 µl Lyse 1
steps.instruction: Add 500 µl Lyse 1. undetermined, Lyse 1

steps.title: Add 50 µl Lyse 2
steps.instruction: Add 50 µl Lyse 2. undetermined, Lyse 2

steps.title: Add 10 µl Proteinase K
steps.instruction: Add 10 µl Proteinase K. undetermined, Proteinase K

steps.title: Incubate in a thermomixer at 65°C for 12 hours
steps.instruction: Incubate in a thermomixer at 65°C for 12 hours. 12:00:00, Incubation at 65°C

steps.title: Centrifuge for 10 min at 13000rpm
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 10 min at 13000rpm. 00:10:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Discard supernatant without disturbing the pellet
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant without disturbing the pellet.

steps.title: Add 375 µl Lyse 3 undetermined, Lyse 3
steps.instruction: Add 375 µl Lyse 3 undetermined, Lyse 3

steps.title: Vortex for 20 sec
steps.instruction: Vortex for 20 sec. 00:00:20, Vortex

steps.title: Leave it for 5 min in...
steps.instruction: Leave it for 5 min in the freezer (-20°C) 00:05:00, Freezer

steps.title: Centrifuge 20 min at 13000rpm
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 20 min at 13000rpm. 00:20:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant in a new tube
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant in a new tube.

steps.title: Add 640 µl isopropanol
steps.instruction: Add 640 µl isopropanol. undetermined, Isopropanol

steps.title: Centrifuge for 15 min at 13000 rpm
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 min at 13000 rpm. 00:15:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Remove the supernatant (don´t touch the pellet)
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant (don´t touch the pellet).

steps.title: Add 150 µl ethanol
steps.instruction: Add 150 µl ethanol. undetermined, Ethanol

steps.title: Centrifuge for 5 min at 13000 rpm
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 5 min at 13000 rpm. 00:05:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Remove the ethanol with a pipette (don´t touch the pellet)
steps.instruction: Remove the ethanol with a pipette (don´t touch the pellet).

steps.title: Dry the pellet (37°C open lid max 5 min)
steps.instruction: Dry the pellet (37°C open lid max 5 min). 00:05:00, Dry

steps.title: Re-suspend the pellet in 100 µl Buffer AE
steps.instruction: Re-suspend the pellet in 100 µl Buffer AE. undetermined, Buffee AE

steps.title: Measure DNA concentration on Nanodrop (Thermo Fischer Scientific, Darmstadt, DE)
steps.instruction: Measure DNA concentration on Nanodrop (Thermo Fischer Scientific, Darmstadt, DE).

steps.title: Mix by inversion
steps.instruction: Mix by inversion.
